response.step_by_step_log:
1. I identified the song title 'Nikkori^^ Chousatai no Theme' from the on-screen text.
2. I performed a web search using '"にっこり^^調査隊のテーマ" lyrics Japanese and English' to retrieve the song's original lyrics and English translation.
3. The performer is Gigi Murin, performing with a virtual wizard model.
4. I created the JSON structure, including the lyrics found.
response.global_summary: A virtual streamer performance featuring Gigi Murin and a wizard character performing the song 'Nikkori^^ Chousatai no Theme'. The video includes a short dialogue intro and outro announcements regarding 3D merchandise.

scenes.description: The performance of the song 'Nikkori^^ Chousatai no Theme' begins after a short intro. Gigi Murin and the wizard are dancing and singing.
scenes.song_title: にっこり^^調査隊のテーマ (Nikkori^^ Chousatai no Theme)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
にっこり調査隊 おはこんばんちわ (how are you?)
今日も今日とて 最高です おぉ～わんだほーい！
探索！コレクション！探求！ E・G・A・O
諸君！（はい！）
我々は世界の笑顔を調査する！
はい隊長 俺に名案が
却下 ってまだなにもいってないんだが？
もー とーにーかーく あれだほら
カナブンは一見にしかず？
あぁ 百聞は一見に如かずだねぇ（それそれ！）
つまり虫取り？！
違うって 隊長！（なになに～）
提案があります ぜひ聞かせてほしいものだな
とりあえず
とりあえず？
とりあえず出発しよう
ノープランで
うん！
ちょっと待って
え？
出発進行！
ちょっとまってって！旅支度くらいさせろ～！
数・日・後
じゃあ持ち物チェックをはじめまーす
まずは基本の！
ぱ！ ぱぱ パスポート持った？
はーい！
き！きき 着替え
わすれた！
え～
も！モバイルバッテリー 持った？
はーい
こ！志はもった？
もちろん！
仲間がいて 私がいる
しかもフツー
にっこりこりこりこりお利口ちゃん
陰キャも陽キャも ウェルカム ウェルカム
君の笑顔が調査対象さ
いいぇーいいぇいいぇい いぇ～
フィジカル メンタル トータルOK
ききめ抜群の エンタ～↓テイメ～ン↑
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Niccori Survey Team!
Good morn-evenin-n (how are you?)
Today is also the best, as usual
Oh~ Wonderhoi!
Search! Collection! Investigation! E-G-A-O
Everyone! (Yes!)
We are investigating the world's smiles!
Yes, Captain! I have a great idea!
Rejected!
Wait, you haven't even heard it yet!
Geez, anyway... that, look
Is 'kanabun' (dung beetle) seeing is believing?
Ah, you mean 'seeing is believing' (hyakubun wa ikken ni shikazu), right? (That's it, that's it!)
So, bug catching?!
That's not it, Captain! (What is it~?)
I have a proposal!
I'd love to hear it!
For now...
For now?
For now, let's set off!
No plan!
Yeah!
Wait a minute!
Eh?
Departure proceed!
Wait, I said wait! Let me at least pack!
A few days later...
Now, let's start the item check!
First, the basic one!
Pa!
Pa-Pa, did you pack your passport?
Yes!
Ki! Ki-Ki, clothes!
I forgot!
Eh~
Mo! Did you pack your mobile battery?
Yes!
Ko! Did you bring your ambition?
Of course!
There are companions, and I am here too!
And it's not just usual
Niccori-kori-kori-kori, you good children
Welcome, welcome, whether you're an introvert or an extrovert
Your smile is the subject of our investigation
Yeah-yeah-yeah, yeah~
Physical, Mental, Total OK!
Effectiveness is outstanding, Enter~tainment!
